name: Pralines #2
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients except vanilla and bring to a boil.
- To roast pecans: Bake on a sheet pan at 350°F for 20-25 minutes until slightly browned and fragrant.
2. Cook to soft ball stage (238-240°F), stirring constantly.
3. Remove from heat, add vanilla, and stir until the mixture thickens, becomes creamy and cloudy, and the pecans remain suspended.
4. Spoon onto buttered wax paper, aluminum foil, or parchment paper.
- Makes approximately 1-50 pralines (depending on size). When using wax paper, place it over newspaper to prevent hot wax from transferring to the surface below.
Note: Recipe from Chef Joe Cahn at the New Orleans School of Cooking.
